rows.label: tev066901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Zo Geil about his relatives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zo Geil if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Zo Geil about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Zo Geil about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Amongst our house is a young woman
named Zazhi. How stubborn she is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now that she is of age, I have
tried to find her a respectable
house to marry into.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0003
rows.name:
But her quest for vengeance causes her to forget
her manners. She wore ARMOR to the last matchmaking
ceremony in lieu of proper attire! Pah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Will Zazhi wear armor to her wedding
as well? Will she fight? This is
the sort of gossip she invites.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0009
rows.name:
I have sent a soldier of mine, Gu Ladha,
to your city. But it sounds as though she
is struggling and has no one to turn to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0010
rows.name:
A man's troubles can be wrested away
by good friends and strong drink.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0011
rows.name:
But Ladha is a woman.
How do I talk to her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0012
rows.name:
I hope she finds some
lass she can confide in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0013
rows.name:
But knowing her, she will push away
any who try to get close to her.
That one likes her solitary gloom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0018
rows.name:
Since making Gu Ladha liaison,
our deliberations with humans have
proceeded much more smoothly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Her attentive personality
works in our favor here. I
appreciate your sage advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Like most Larsians, I have a habit of
placing battle prowess above all else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0021
rows.name:
But if we are to live in this
city, we must avail ourselves
of ALL our strengths.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0022
rows.name:
You have taught me that a leader
like myself needs to be able to spot
these gifts amongst his soldiers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0027
rows.name:
Until recently, a soldier of mine, Gu
Ladha, was all wound up in her problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0028
rows.name:
But something has snapped her out of her gloom,
and now she throws herself at her training with
abandon. I marvel at the progress she has made.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0029
rows.name:
She always showed a gift for Dolls. If she keeps
it up, she shall do great things on the battlefield
when we face off against the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066901_MSG0030
rows.name:
I wish I knew who put her back
on such a positive path so I
could thank them myself.[ST:wait ]
